locations.name: Countess (Normal)
locations.notes: Guaranteed rune drops up to Ral

locations.name: Countess (Nightmare)
locations.notes: Drops up to Ko, reliable for low-mid runes

locations.name: Countess (Hell)
locations.notes: Drops up to Ist (rare), reliable for mid runes

locations.name: Hellforge (Nightmare)
locations.notes: One-time per difficulty: drops Hel-Gul range

locations.name: Arcane Sanctuary
locations.notes: Ghosts have good rune drop rates, no item drops to compete

locations.name: Lower Kurast Superchests
locations.notes: Best for Sur/Ber drops. Run the campfire pattern — 2 campfires with superchests nearby. Players 7+ recommended

locations.name: Travincal Council
locations.notes: High monster density council members. Good for all high runes, fast runs

locations.name: Chaos Sanctuary
locations.notes: Seal bosses have high treasure class. Also great XP

locations.name: Cows (Secret Cow Level)
locations.notes: Very high monster count = more chances for rune drops

locations.name: Worldstone Keep
locations.notes: High area level (85), good density, can chain with Baal runs

locations.name: Countess (Hell)
locations.notes: Can drop up to Ist from special rune table, Lo from regular drops

locations.name: Hellforge (Hell)
locations.notes: One-time: drops Hel-Gul range. Do on every character
